name: TestGetWaitPDUsTPUDPSrcPort
title: TestGetWaitPDUsTPUDPSrcPort
description: If a PDU was received via UDP that triggered the last wait function, with form 1 the UDP source port can be requested.
Form 2 can only be used for joined events. The number of the joined event (return value of TestJoin...) is here being used as an index.
